title: Amazon Job Cuts in Artificial General Intelligence Unit Reported
description: Multiple sources report that Amazon has cut jobs within its artificial general intelligence unit, with confirmation coming ahead of the Q2 earnings report.

sources.title: Amazon Cuts Jobs in Artificial General Intelligence Unit
Amazon cuts some jobs in its artificial general intelligence unit
Amazon Confirms AGI Layoffs Ahead Of Q2 Earnings Report

sections.heading: Job Reductions in AGI Unit
paragraphs: According to the Wall Street Journal, Amazon has cut jobs in its Artificial General Intelligence Unit. CNBC similarly reports that Amazon has cut some jobs in its artificial general intelligence unit.

sections.heading: Confirmation and Earnings Context
paragraphs: CRN reports that Amazon has confirmed the AGI layoffs. This confirmation took place ahead of the Q2 earnings report according to CRN.

sections.heading: Search Trend Details
paragraphs: The search term "amazon" is trending in the SE region. The trend feed was published on Wed, 22 Jul 2026, with a snapshot taken on 2026-07-23T03:44:49+00:00. Google reported a search lower bound of 200.

faq.q: What did the Wall Street Journal report regarding Amazon?
faq.a: The Wall Street Journal reported that Amazon cut jobs in its Artificial General Intelligence Unit.
According to CRN, Amazon confirmed the AGI layoffs ahead of the Q2 earnings report.
